identity.limited_access: Limited account capabilities. Verify to unlock.

power.description: System operates on low-cost servers. Initiate donation sequence to upgrade infrastructure.

privacy.panic_desc: If forced to unlock your device, entering this password will silently obliterate all local data.
privacy.dead_man_desc: Automatically destroy your account if inactive for a set period.

smart.privacy_desc: Incoming messages are decrypted on-device and sent securely to Google Gemini for analysis. Messages are <1>not stored</1> by our servers.

support.background_desc: To receive notifications when NYX is closed, ensure your device allows this app to run in the background.
support.android_guide_steps: <0>🤖 Android:</0> Settings > Apps > NYX (Chrome/any Browser you use if you are not installing nyx into home screen) > Battery > <1>Unrestricted</1>
support.ios_guide_steps: <0>🍎 iOS:</0> Settings > NYX (or Safari/Chrome) > <1>Enable Background App Refresh</1>

emergency.delete_desc: PERMANENTLY erase all data from servers. This action is irreversible.

modals.sandbox_mode: You are currently in <1>Sandbox Mode</1>. Upgrade to remove messaging limits and unlock group creation.
modals.biometric_desc: Use Fingerprint or FaceID. Takes 1 second.
modals.pow_idle: Solve a cryptographic puzzle with your CPU. Takes 5-10 seconds.

keys_page.title: Cryptographic Vault
keys_page.subtitle: End-to-End Encryption Protocol
keys_page.description: Your private keys are the only way to decrypt your messages. They are stored locally on this device. <1>Losing these keys means losing your message history forever.</1>
keys_page.recovery_desc: Reveal your 24-word seed phrase for backup.
keys_page.rotation_desc: Generates new identity keys. Old messages will become unreadable.
keys_page.confirm_rotation_desc: WARNING: DESTRUCTIVE ACTION. Previous message history will become undecryptable. This action is irreversible.

messages.biometric_scan_now: Scan fingerprint now to LOCK your vault...
messages.biometric_success: Biometric active! You can now login without password.
messages.mining_success: Proof Accepted! Account upgraded to VIP.
messages.export_success: Vault exported successfully! Keep this file safe.
messages.import_failed: Invalid vault file or corrupted data.
messages.emergency_failed: Failed to revoke remote sessions. Check your network connection.
